headline: Man's Fridge Starts Leaving Him Passive-Aggressive Notes About His Eating Habits
summary: 'You don't need another cheese,' one note read. '— The Fridge'
fullBody: Barry McFridge has been receiving passive-aggressive notes from his refrigerator. 'You don't need another cheese,' one read. 'You opened me 47 times yesterday,' another said. Barry has tried to remove the notes. They reappear. 'The fridge is monitoring me,' Barry said. He now opens the fridge slowly and 'apologetically.' The fridge has become the dominant relationship in his life.
